phase: consumed-development six-month prequential meta-label viability screen

predecessor.finding: The one-month meta-fit models had in-sample ROC AUC 0.726-0.769 but later-role AUC only 0.564-0.647. Evaluation AUC remained above chance in every month, and one December policy slice was positive, so retain the target and replace only the short in-sample meta history with a longer strictly out-of-fold prequential history.

target_and_accounting_contract.entry_price: USD-M perpetual open of minute t+1
target_and_accounting_contract.exit_price: USD-M perpetual open exactly 30 minutes after entry
target_and_accounting_contract.meta_target: one only when the causal primary proposal's side has exact net utility above zero after charge and funding cash flow

roles_per_target_month.training: 15 complete calendar months ending two months before target
roles_per_target_month.early_stop_and_temperature: complete calendar month immediately before target

prequential_primary_panel.architecture: three per-symbol direct multiclass LightGBM models per target month
prequential_primary_panel.backend: OpenCL LightGBM with explicit CPU fallback
prequential_primary_panel.prediction_panel_storage: single in-memory float32 array; no persistent duplicate

roles_per_evaluation_month.meta_fit: six complete prequential target months ending three months before evaluation
roles_per_evaluation_month.meta_early_stop: second complete calendar month before evaluation
roles_per_evaluation_month.capacity_threshold_calibration: complete calendar month immediately before evaluation

meta_label_model.architecture: one shared binary LightGBM profitability classifier per evaluation month
features: calibrated prequential primary short abstain and long probabilities
proposed side encoded as minus one or plus one
meta_label_model.backend: OpenCL LightGBM with explicit CPU fallback

causal_capacity_and_threshold_contract.capacity_selection: accept first threshold-crossing proposals in timestamp order until the daily symbol budget is exhausted
causal_capacity_and_threshold_contract.no_passing_threshold_action: route no evaluation actions and record fail-closed abstention

aggregate_viability_gate.failure_action: reject without accessing 2025-H2 or 2026 and do not run AI

ai_ablation_contract.provider: local Ollama or llama.cpp compatible GGUF
ai_ablation_contract.case_sampling: chronological ML actions with outcome-independent SHA-256 parity sampling, truncated after 180 cases

required_outputs: 14 prequential primary schedules with embargo and row counts
42 primary and 6 meta model artifacts with reload identity
primary prediction panel monthly classification metrics
meta fit early calibration and evaluation metrics for all six refits
216 calibration threshold traces including zero-action months
monthly and aggregate nonoverlapping exact-net replays
daily capacity usage and rejection counts by symbol
symbol month funding loss-streak and stationary day-block attribution
AI prompt response identity and matched uplift only after the ML gate

research_basis.title: Trading via Selective Classification
research_basis.use: supports learned abstention with walk-forward evaluation

research_basis.title: Online Learning Under Concept Drift With Delayed Labels
research_basis.use: supports temporally valid adaptation when outcomes arrive after prediction

research_basis.title: Backtest Overfitting in the Machine Learning Era
research_basis.use: requires continued development-only labeling on this consumed walk-forward period

research_basis.title: Machine Learning-Based Bitcoin Trading Under Transaction Costs
research_basis.use: supports preserving explicit cost-aware action filtering
